Setup
1
Game Board: Place in center of the table.
2
Region Tiles: 1 random scoring tile on each of the 6 Influence Tracks, correct player-count side.
3
Mastery Cards: Deal 3 faceup, correct side. Return rest to box.
4
Supply: Shuffle customer deck facedown. Pile nearby.
5
Starting Buildings:
A.3 Imperial Market tiles → 3 Imperial Market spaces.
B.1 starting tile on each shore space marked for your player count.
6
Building Row:
A.Place building board near main board.
B.Stack Era 1 + Era 2 tiles facedown (see table).
C.Draw top 4 Era 1 tiles to the building row.
PlayersStarting TilesEra 1Era 2
43 Imperial Markets1613
3+ 3 starting1411
2+ 6 starting129
7
Player Setup: Clan Board · 2 Standard Ships (top + middle spaces) · 1 Royal Ship · 22 Clan Markers (1 on each Track start) · · 2 Customer Cards (hidden) · Score 0 · 3–4 · on 2 · 1 Die.
8
First Player: Randomize. by turn order: 1st: 7 · 2nd: 8 · 3rd: 9 · 4th: 10
9
Place Ships: Roll die for each ship; move it that many spaces downstream.
10
(Optional) Reverse order: each player picks 1 Patron Card.
11
Roll Die ready for Turn 1.
Your Turn — 4 Steps in Order
1
Spend Divine Favour
±1 per spent. A 6 wraps to 1 and vice versa.
marker = your maximum.
2
Take an Action — Region matches die
Build  /  Sail  /  Deliver
3
Claim Masteries (optional)
Place Clan Marker on highest unclaimed Mastery reward you meet or exceed. Score VP immediately. Once per card per game.
4
Roll Die for your next turn.
Actions
🏗 Build a Building
1
Choose an empty Shore space in a Region matching your die.
2
Pay the Koku cost on the Shore space.
3
Move 1 Building Tile from the row there.
Last tile → +1 Divine Favour.
4
Place 1 Clan Marker; advance on that Region's Influence Track,
collecting rewards you pass.
Influence beyond track end is lost.
5
Slide remaining tiles down; refill the row.
Multiple markers may share a track space
Sail a Ship
1
Move 1 Ship downstream spaces equal to your die.
Last → first space = Complete your Journey.
2
Collect Visitor rewards (pointed ends) from all 4 adjacent Shore spaces.
Empty spaces = 1 each.
3
All owners of adjacent Buildings (including you) collect Owner rewards (flat ends) .
= that Building's Region.
Cannot move upstream · Cannot pass through another Ship
📜 Deliver to a Customer
1
Choose 1 Customer Card from hand whose Region matches your die.
2
Discard Trade Goods
equal to the Order Request.
3
Place card faceup.
Delivery reward immediately.
Ongoing ability activates.
End-game ability scores in Final Scoring.
4
Draw 2 new Customer Cards;
discard 1 from hand faceup.
Must be completable in full to perform
Completing Your Journey
1
Gain 3 Koku or 1 Trade Good.
2
Activate your Merchants with completed orders.
3
Discard tile at end of Building Row; slide and refill.

When a Ship wraps from the last river space back to the first.

⚠ Emperor's Visit

When the last Era 1 tile enters the Building Row, all players collect Owner rewards (flat end) for every Building they own.

End Game & Final Scoring

Trigger: Last Era 2 tile enters the Building Row.

1
Current player scores 5 VP.
2
Each other player takes 1 final Turn.
3
Final Scoring:
① Influence: VP for 1st / 2nd (some: 3rd) per Region. No influence = 0. Ties: split evenly rounded down.
2p: 2nd only if within 5 spaces of 1st.
②Customers delivered → VP (see table).
③End-game card abilities

Tiebreaker: most Divine Favour.

Customers Delivered → VP

Max 25 Koku  ·  Max 6 of any Trade Good  ·  Actions completable in full
